The Hospital for Farms. Soil Intelligence. Environmental Data. Crop Science. Field Command.

Smallholders feed the world.
We make sure they never farm blind again.

MazaoHub is the farm-care infrastructure for smallholders and emerging farmers — combining soil diagnostics, soil amendments, crop-health monitoring & treatment, water management, input-dosage precision, real-time farm-activity tracking, AI agronomy, and field-based human support.

Join a Farmer Excellence Center Explore the global engine

SOIL pH · N · P · K · moisture · EC  —  results in 5 minutes FERTILIZER price index ▲ live CLIMATE rainfall anomaly tracking AI agronomy advisory · 15,000+ queries / day MARKETS CropSupply global sourcing NITROGEN demand mapping across farms CARBON credits for a healthier planet
The problem we refuse to accept

The people who feed the world farm in the dark.

Smallholders grow a third of the world's food — yet most farm blind: no soil test, inputs guessed at, pests and weather erasing a season, and no records to earn credit or a fair price. The knowledge to fix this has always existed. It just never reached the farm.

Read the field report
5 of 6farms worldwide are smallholdings
1 / 3of the world's food they grow
Up to 40%of a harvest lost without the right care
Mostfarm with no soil test, no record, no safety net
What we offer

Three layers of intelligence, one living system.

We replace guesswork with ground truth — affordable soil science, hyperlocal advisory, and dashboards turning every farm into trusted data for banks, buyers, ministries, input manufacturers, distributors and research institutions.

01 / SOIL

Affordable soil testing

Geo-tagged sensors capture nutrients, pH, moisture, temperature and electro-conductivity — automated, real-time analysis ready in 5 minutes of testing.

02 / ADVISORY

Hyperlocal, expert advisory

Our Farmer Excellence Centers are trust-and-value hubs — farm software, extension services, input delivery and soil testing, all in one place, all close to home.

03 / DATA

Data & insights for all

Dashboards that help farmers run operations, food companies optimize supply chains, and banks issue loans against verified, real-time farm performance.

We are turning traditional agrovet shops into Farm Clinics — a hospital for farms, powered by AI, data and science.

MazaoHub is changing how the world treats soil, water, plants, microorganisms, farmers — and the environment itself.

The AI engine beneath every harvest

We are building the world's largest intelligence engine for agriculture.

Drones, soil sensors, satellite climate feeds and a network of agronomists feed one model. It diagnoses, recommends and forecasts — then learns from every transaction on the ground. The more the network farms, the smarter the engine gets. This is the intelligence flywheel.

Open the intelligence dashboard
01 · TRANSACTFarmers test, order, harvest
02 · GROUND TRUTHReal soil & yield data
03 · FORECASTAI predicts & recommends
04 · BETTER DECISIONSMore activity, more data
AIFLYWHEEL

Autonomous drones

Aerial scouting, spraying maps and crop stress detection across plots.

AI agronomy agents

24/7 advisory in Swahili, English & French, answering 15,000+ farmer queries daily.

Yield forecasting

Predict harvest volumes per crop, per region, before the season ends.

Sensor network

Geo-tagged soil kits stream live nutrient, moisture and EC readings.

Human + AI, every single day

AI agronomy agents, backed by a call center and a field team.

Around the clock, our AI agronomy agents work hand in hand with a live call center and agronomists in the field — answering 15,000+ farmer queries every day in Swahili, English and French.

Always on

AI agronomy agents

Instant, always-on answers trained on MazaoHub's ground-truth soil, crop and weather data — over chat, SMS and the app.

Human escalation

Call center

Live human agronomists pick up whatever the AI escalates — voice, WhatsApp and SMS, in the farmer's own language.

On the ground

Field team

Hundreds of field agronomists visit, verify and act — closing the loop between advice on the screen and work in the soil.

SW Kiswahili EN English FR Français
24/7advisory, every day
15,000+queries answered daily
3languages supported
Global agricultural data intelligence

Eight engines. One source of truth for the whole value chain.

Eight always-on intelligence engines turn millions of farm-level signals into one source of truth for the entire value chain. Input manufacturers, distributors, traders, governments, lenders and investors plug straight into the data — every engine below is clickable and opens a live command-center view. This is global agricultural data intelligence, built field by field.

ENGINE 01

Soil & Nutrient Data

Soil pH, NPK & organic matter — mapped across 500k+ hectares.

205,472samples indexed
 ENGINE 02

Nitrogen & Fertilizer

Fertilizer demand, usage & prices — tap for market intelligence.

Liveprice index
 ENGINE 03

Herbicides & Crop Protection

Herbicide & pesticide demand vs live pest pressure.

3,000+agrovets connected
 ENGINE 04

Machinery & Mechanization

Equipment demand & mechanization coverage.

Leasemarketplace
 ENGINE 05

Climate & Environment

Rainfall, drought risk & growing-season forecasts.

Earlywarning alerts
 ENGINE 06

Crop & Commodity Prices

Village-to-export crop price movements.

Globalprice feed
 ENGINE 07

Yield Forecast

Per-crop, per-region harvest forecasts.

Predictbefore harvest
 ENGINE 08

Carbon & Sustainability

Climate-smart adoption & carbon credits.

Creditsverified on-farm
For input manufacturers & importers

Your route to market — connected, controlled, data-driven.

Whether you make or import seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, bio-stimulants, animal feed, irrigation tools or mechanization solutions, MazaoHub is far more than logistics — it's a live demand engine that reaches the last mile.

See demand before it happens. Know which crops are planted, where, and which inputs are about to be ordered.
Distribution you can trace. Track product from manufacturer to dealer to farmer, district by district.
3,000+ agrovets, one network. Reach a verified, connected channel through Inputs Connect.
Recommendation-led sales. Your products surface inside AI agronomy advice, exactly where they're needed.
See manufacturer access Open Inputs Connect
Inputs Connect · live demand mapFertilizer & crop-protection orders aggregated from farmers and agronomists in real time.
For agribusinesses, off-takers & plantations

From one outgrower scheme to 100,000-hectare plantations.

MazaoHub runs the full operating system for contract farming and estates — register growers, map every plot, monitor crop health, dose inputs precisely, track field activity in real time, and prove origin all the way to the buyer. One platform, whether you manage 50 outgrowers or a 100,000-hectare sugarcane estate.

Run your outgrower scheme

Onboard growers, assign field officers, issue inputs on credit and reconcile every delivery — each contract in one place.

Traceability & compliance

Plot polygons, farm-to-buyer chain-of-custody and EUDR, organic and carbon-credit readiness — built in.

Field teams & cost control

Direct agronomists where they're needed, cut procurement and logistics waste, and watch performance live.

Finance-ready data

Verified yield and activity records give growers credit histories — unlocking working capital and insurance.

50 → 100,000+ haone platform, any size
Outgrower → Estatesmallholder schemes to commercial plantations
Farm → Buyerfull chain-of-custody traceability

How it works

From soil to sale, in six connected steps.

STEP 01

Register & map

Farmer, plot and GPS captured at a Farm Clinic.

STEP 02

Test soil

5-minute sensor analysis — pH, NPK, moisture, EC.

STEP 03

AI recommends

Tailored inputs, fertilizer and crop plan.

STEP 04

Order inputs

Connected to the nearest verified agrovet.

STEP 05

Monitor & verify

Agronomists track and confirm field activity.

STEP 06

Sell to markets

Harvest linked to buyers via CropSupply.com.

Pricing

One platform. Every farm, every step.

Tailored packages that connect you to precision, profit and possibility — priced per season.

SHF Package
Localized agronomy for smallholders with a dedicated agronomist & assigned Farm Clinic.
$25 / season
  • Farm planning: cost, profit & buyer forecast
  • Localized knowledge hub by crop & season
  • Input recommendations + nearest dealer
  • Soil test reports & tailored advice
Get started
Cooperatives & AMCOS
Full-stack model turning cooperatives into smart, profitable rural enterprises.
$500 / season
  • Member registration & GPS farm mapping
  • Bulk soil testing & group recommendations
  • Bank-ready statements & clean audit records
  • Aggregated produce & inventory management
Book a demo
Outgrower Package
Field support, soil kits & agronomists for outgrower companies. Unlimited users.
$1,500 / season
  • Outgrower registration & soil kit leasing
  • Fertility maps & AI nutrient recommendations
  • Remote supervision dashboard & GAP monitoring
  • Wallet, loan tracker & season ROI reports
Talk to us
Agronomist Package
Standardized agronomy management with farmers assigned by location.
$200 / season
  • Soil sensor & AI recommendations at scale
  • Register, map & guide thousands of farmers
  • Earn commission via CropSupply sales
Get started
InputsConnect Package
The new way to grow your agro-input business — more sales, more reach.
$300 / season
  • Digital store & e-commerce for inputs
  • Demand trends from real farmer orders
  • Equipment leasing marketplace & bulk SMS
Open Inputs Connect
Government Data Package
Data-driven agronomy, national crop marketing & traceability at country scale.
Custom
  • Real-time crop production dashboard to village level
  • Subsidy impact & input traceability monitoring
  • Export readiness, early warning & food balance sheets

Home / Pricing

Pricing

Empowering every farm, every step: tailored MazaoHub pricing packages that connect you to precision, profit, and possibility.

SHF Package

Localized agronomy services for smallholder farmers with a DEDICATED AGRONOMIST and an ASSIGNED FARMER EXCELLENT CENTER.

25 USD / Season
  • Farm planning: instant farming cost estimate, profit forecast, and buyer suggestions
  • Knowledge Hub: localized, tailored farming knowledge by crop, soil, village, and season
  • Place an Order: personalized input recommendations connected to a nearby input dealer
  • Monitor Farm Activities: track daily operations, mark tasks complete, agronomist verifies
  • Analysis & Insights: detailed reports on soil, expenses, climate, and activity compliance
  • Farmers Forum: peer-to-peer learning by crop — maize, avocado, onion, and more
  • Assigned to dedicated agronomists and verified agrovets (FECs) for support and validation
  • Soil test reports and tailored recommendations on fertilizers and soil amendments
Request a proposal

Agronomist Package

Smart, standardized agronomy-service management with farmers assigned based on your location.

200 USD / Season
  • Soil sensor, testing, and AI recommendations simplified to support thousands of farmers
  • Register farmers, map farms, manage data, and guide farmers every step of farming
  • Farm planning: validate cost estimates, profit forecasts, and buyer suggestions
  • Knowledge Hub: localized knowledge by crop, soil, village, diseases, pests, and season
  • Inputs ordering tool based on location and tailored recommendations
  • Monitor farm activities and verify completed tasks against what was done in the field
  • Provide personalized analysis & insights with real-time performance reports
  • Participate in the Farmers Forum for peer learning and expert advisory
  • Aggregate produce, verify quality, and earn commission via CropSupply.com sales
Request a proposal
Most popular

Cooperatives & AMCOS

Full-stack model for cooperatives, AMCOS, and group-based agribusinesses — turning them into smart, profitable rural enterprises.

500 USD / Season
  • Member registration & GPS mapping with a digital identity per farmer/member
  • Bulk soil testing & group-based recommendations
  • Monitoring tools for agronomists and leaders
  • Activity tracking per member or per cluster
  • Manage income, expenses, and loans per member
  • Track group savings and share contributions
  • Generate clean, auditable reports (“hati safi”)
  • Prepare bank-ready statements for funding and partnerships
  • Control fraud, leakage, and mismanagement with role-based access
  • Inventory management (inputs & produce)
  • Aggregated produce records (volume, quality, price)
  • See which farmers are increasing yields; identify underperforming plots
  • Offer soil testing and agronomy services to members and neighbors
  • Bulk purchases, bulk payments, and bulk communications

Mid-size Farmers

Helps mid-size farmers scale with precision — built for profitability and expansion with a DEDICATED AGRONOMIST and ASSIGNED FECs.

200 USD / Season
  • Full farm mapping & soil intelligence with fertility maps per plot
  • Customized recommendations for fertilizer, manure, and soil amendments
  • Dedicated agronomist from pre-planting to post-harvest
  • Farm planning: cost estimate, profit forecast, and buyer suggestions
  • Knowledge Hub and personalized input ordering
  • Monitor activities; agronomist verifies completed tasks
  • Analysis & insights on soil, expenses, climate, and compliance
  • Remote Farm Dashboard: live view of all activities and updates
  • Virtual Farm Manager integration to assign, monitor, and communicate remotely
  • Daily photo & video uploads of plots, crops, and workers
  • Task scheduling & alerts with deadlines and skip notifications
  • Smart input usage logs (who, when, how much, which plot)
  • Harvest log & sales tracking (quantity, seller, money collected)
  • Remote decision support from your dedicated agronomist

At the heart of MazaoHub lies our most important partner: the Smallholder Farmer — the everyday hero who cultivates one, two, or three acres of land, often with limited tools but unlimited dreams. These are the men and women who feed families, sustain rural economies, and brave the uncertainties of weather and markets with resilience and hope.

But we see more than just a farmer. We see a business owner, a potential climate champion, a data user, and a community pillar. That's why we've built MazaoHub to work not just for them — but *with* them, through a powerful combination of Tech and Touch.

TECH: Soil intelligence, AI insights, and a smart agronomy system

Our technology starts beneath the surface — literally.

Soil testing with portable kits

Using our easy-to-carry Soil Testing Kits, agronomists and farmers collect real-time soil samples directly from the field, analyzed instantly on-site with digital tools. Precision recommendations follow immediately:

  • Best fertilizer types and organic amendments
  • Soil correction plans to restore and sustain long-term fertility
  • Suggestions to cut synthetic inputs and boost natural regeneration

This isn't just testing soil. It's healing land. It's activating potential.

Data-driven agronomy services, delivered through software

MazaoHub is a smart agronomic companion. Every registered farmer enters a personalized support journey with six core services:

  1. Farm Planning: once a farm is mapped and registered, the software generates a customized plan based on location, crop, soil health, and season — from planting to harvest, including expected costs and potential profit.
  2. Personalized Knowledge Hub: tailored guidance based on crop type, location-specific weather, soil type, pest and disease alerts, and local best practices.
  3. Input & Equipment Orders via FECs & Partners: order certified seeds, fertilizers, biological treatments, tractors, planters, and more — all with real-time tracking.
  4. Manage & Track Daily Activities: every activity, from weeding to spraying, recorded digitally with reminders and GPS tracking, building a clean farm history that becomes valuable data for planning and financing.
  5. Personalized Analysis & Agronomic Insights: timely feedback such as whether spraying aligned with rainfall, late-maturity warnings, and nutrient-deficiency alerts.
  6. Farmers Forum: a community space to ask questions, share results, and learn from one another digitally.

TOUCH: Human support at the village level

Even the smartest software doesn't replace people — that's where the Touch model comes in.

Farmer Excellent Centers (FECs)

Local agribusiness hubs built in partnership with agro-dealers, co-ops, or trained youth. They are rural command centers where farmers walk in and walk out with real help. We support FECs with training, tools, soil kits, tablets running MazaoHub software, and linkage to national and global buyers — an in-person extension arm and franchise model that empowers local entrepreneurs.

Empowered extension officers — public or private

We equip private and government extension officers with our software, soil tools, and data dashboards, turning the ordinary officer into a super-agent of precision agronomy who can recommend precise solutions, support hundreds of farmers at once, monitor crop progress, collect data for credit scoring, and provide in-person care powered by tech and AI.

Finance & markets: where data works for the farmer

All field-level data — soil, inputs, activities, harvests — is safely stored and structured, then used to help farmers access financing: partner banks review farmer records, credit scoring becomes easier, and loans reach the right hands.

And then comes CropSupply.com

Our final promise is connecting every farmer to market. With CropSupply.com we aggregate and map harvest data before the crop is even planted, so buyers can pre-order directly from the farmer, farmers see price trends by region, contract farming becomes transparent, and post-harvest sales are organized and predictable. A farmer in rural Singida can negotiate with a buyer in Dar, Nairobi, or Dubai with confidence.

What farmers say

  • "After using MazaoHub, I improved my maize yields by 20%." — John, Shinyanga
  • "MazaoHub helped me reduce my fertilizer costs by 15%, so I make more profit." — Mary, Mbeya
  • "I can track expenses, monitor crop progress, and get expert advice — my farming business is so much easier."
  • "MazaoHub helped me increase my yields by 30%. I now make a good living from farming."
  • "MazaoHub has made me a more informed farmer — I know what to do to improve yields and cut costs."
Who we serve

In today's agriculture, Cooperatives and AMCOS are no longer just collection points. They are agribusiness centers, market drivers, and community accelerators. At MazaoHub, we believe that when a cooperative is empowered with the right digital tools and support systems, entire farming communities thrive. That's why we've built a full-stack service model for cooperatives, AMCOS, and group-based agribusinesses — turning them into smart rural enterprises.

Digital tools — turning cooperatives into smart agribusinesses

Cooperative agronomy & group farming software

We digitize everything from plot registration to harvest tracking:

  • Member registration & GPS mapping of farms
  • Bulk soil testing & group-based recommendations
  • Activity tracking per member or per cluster
  • Monitoring tools for agronomists and leaders
  • Performance reports for each farmer

Accounting software built for cooperatives

A fully integrated accounting system that helps cooperatives:

  • Manage income, expenses, and loans per member
  • Track group savings and share contributions
  • Generate clean, auditable reports ("hati safi")
  • Prepare bank-ready statements for funding and partnerships
  • Control fraud, leakage, and mismanagement with role-based access

Every coin is accounted for.

Warehouse & trading management

Manage post-harvest logistics with precision:

  • Inventory management (inputs & produce)
  • Member delivery tracking
  • Aggregated produce records (volume, quality, price)
  • Real-time pricing updates
  • Bulk buyer contract tracking

Run your warehouse like a business — maize, beans, sunflower, or horticulture.

Digital & physical tools for efficiency

  • Digital weighing scales with transaction history
  • Soil sensors to monitor fertility
  • Moisture meters for grains
  • Simple processing machines (maize shellers, oil extractors)
  • Input management systems for agrodealers

All available through purchase or affordable leasing models.

Farmer performance tracking & impact analytics

  • See which farmers are increasing yields
  • Identify underperforming plots
  • Track adoption of training and best practices
  • Reward top farmers with inputs or credit
  • Share data with partners and investors

Market & export support via CropSupply.com

  • Cooperatives listed as official suppliers
  • Buyers pre-book produce directly from your AMCOS
  • Crop traceability builds buyer trust (origin, inputs, harvest date)
  • Market price analysis and contract facilitation
  • Post-harvest logistics with verified aggregators

For exporters: export-readiness checklist, compliance support (traceability, volumes, documentation), partner links with processors and exporters, and digital documentation and buyer negotiation support.

Become a MazaoHub agent or Farmer Excellent Center (FEC)

As an FEC or agent, your cooperative can offer soil testing and agronomy planning to members and neighbors, facilitate orders for inputs and machinery, provide credit-scoring data to banks, earn commissions, and strengthen its role as a rural business leader.

What cooperatives gain

  • All-in-one software for farm, finance, and warehouse operations
  • Clean, auditable accounting reports
  • Access to traceable markets, export partners, and buyers
  • Digitized farmer records and productivity analytics
  • Tools for soil testing, weighing, and post-harvest handling
  • Personalized support and FEC setup for your location
  • Financing facilitation through accurate data
  • A full transformation from traditional AMCOS to a digital agribusiness powerhouse

Customized to your region, crop, or country

Whether your AMCOS works in maize, sunflower, coffee, sesame, horticulture, or rice, we adapt to your local context — Swahili, English, and other regional languages; Tanzanian, Kenyan, Rwandan, and regional regulations; local agronomists and tools nearby; and support for water engineering, greenhouses, and solar irrigation. MazaoHub walks with your cooperative through every season.

While smallholder farmers lay the foundation of food systems, mid-size farmers are the growth engine of modern agriculture. These ambitious producers supply towns, schools, processing companies, and cross-border markets. They think in acres, plan in yields, and operate with a business mindset. MazaoHub has built a complete Tech + Touch model tailored just for them.

TECH: Smart tools for high-efficiency production

Full farm mapping & soil intelligence

We start with deep soil profiling using portable kits and lab-grade analysis. You receive fertility maps per plot, customized recommendations for fertilizer, manure, and soil amendments, and a full regeneration plan for long-term productivity.

Dedicated agronomy dashboard

A full dashboard view of your farm: cropping plans by section, a calendar of tasks, budget projections, pest & disease alerts, and live yield forecasts.

Smart input ordering & machinery booking

With a few clicks — or a call — order certified seeds, fertilizers, and biopesticides; hire tractors, planters, and boom sprayers; get custom irrigation systems or greenhouse installations; and book engineered services like water harvesting, solar pumps, and storage. Everything is tracked and monitored by your dedicated agronomist.

Agronomy services — personalized, consistent, reliable

One farm, one agronomist — from day one to harvest

Each mid-size farmer is assigned a dedicated agronomist who supports you on-call and on-ground, combining AI data and personal insight to guide crop rotation planning, fertility management, weekly monitoring and visits, disease scouting and treatment, and regenerative techniques that cut cost and improve soil life. It's your farm, your advisor, your plan.

Real-time agronomy features

  1. Personalized Knowledge Hub for every block/crop
  2. Farm activity tracking with GPS validation
  3. Seasonal strategy adapted to your region
  4. Mid-season diagnostics with corrective actions
  5. Reports & analytics, always on your phone or email

Financial reports & accounting made simple

We provide dedicated monthly farm accounting reports, input and output records, cashflow projections, profitability per acre, and traceable records for grant access, insurance, and investor readiness — so you can negotiate better, plan better, and grow smarter.

Market access — before and after harvest

Through CropSupply.com we map your crop location, volume, and harvest date in advance, so buyers can pre-book your harvest, exporters and processors can lock volumes before planting, you see real-time prices by region, and you get paid what your crop is worth, with better timing.

TOUCH: In-person, on-call, on-point

Farmer Excellent Centers (FECs)

Your regional FEC is always nearby for soil services, inputs, on-ground technical support, and crop inspections and certifications. These on-ground partners — including private extension officers and agribusiness franchises — are equipped with AI tools and MazaoHub software.

Tailored packages

No two 10-acre farms are the same, so we offer country- and region-specific packages, support for water-scarce or flood-prone areas, packages with or without equipment, add-ons like climate-resilient seeds, greenhouses, and solar irrigation, and engineering assistance for ponds, tanks, and warehouses.

Value proposition for mid-size farmers

  • Dedicated agronomist from pre-planting to post-harvest
  • Digitized records & activity logs
  • Guaranteed input access & machinery
  • Precision irrigation and greenhouse engineering
  • Climate-smart farming techniques
  • Verified records for bank loans
  • Buyer connections before the season starts
  • One-on-one support and smart farming tools

Large-scale farms across Africa are transforming. Whether you manage a sugarcane estate, avocado plantation, sunflower block farm, horticultural hub, or a multi-site grain operation, you need more than software — you need a farm intelligence ecosystem tailored to your environment. Welcome to MazaoHub Enterprise, built specifically for African agribusinesses, combining smart technology (Tech) with on-ground expertise (Touch).

TECH: Enterprise intelligence across the farm

Multi-farm & plantation management system

Get full visibility across multiple estates or plots:

  • Map and digitize thousands of hectares
  • Assign tasks and monitor completion remotely
  • Access dashboards per crop, block, region, or estate
  • Generate cost-benefit analysis by crop, field, or production zone
  • Standardize compliance and quality metrics across sites

From 1,000 acres of sugarcane in Kilombero to 300 acres of macadamia in Rwanda or 50 hectares of onions in Arusha — control everything in one place.

Precision agriculture tools & AI-driven insights

  • Satellite and drone monitoring for crop health
  • Soil fertility maps using in-field sensor kits
  • AI predictions for yield, pest pressure, and nutrient imbalance
  • Remote alerts for irrigation needs, rainfall trends, and disease risk
  • Integration with existing sensors, machinery, or ERP systems

Advanced financial reporting & profitability dashboards

  • Track costs per crop, per acre, per input
  • Link every activity to labor, machine, and material costs
  • Calculate gross margins and ROI in real time
  • Export custom reports for your board, investors, or government
  • Manage salaries, harvest payouts, and labor contracts

Infrastructure, engineering & special projects

Our partner network delivers irrigation systems (drip, pivot, or hybrid), greenhouse construction (tunnels to high-tech smart houses), water harvesting and storage (catchments, tanks, dams), packhouses, sheds, fencing and farm roads, organic farm conversion plans with input sourcing, and solar-powered solutions for irrigation and cold storage — tailored to your environment, scale, and budget.

TOUCH: In-person expertise, on-demand

Dedicated professional agronomists — only for you

We assign top-tier specialists in sugarcane, oil palm, horticulture, avocado/citrus/macadamia, cereals and legumes, and organic transitions/GAP certification. Hire them full-time, on retainer, or project-based from the MazaoHub Agronomist Network across East and Southern Africa. They support crop planning & rotation, fertility optimization, weekly farm visits & scouting, spray schedules & IPM, and yield modeling and decision support.

Extend your market — digitally and globally

Through CropSupply.com: register every batch with a unique ID; link to plot, location, harvest date, fertilizer use, and handling; let exporters, retailers, and processors trace produce back to source; negotiate B2B contracts directly; and lock in buyers before planting with post-harvest logistics support — meeting international traceability and sustainability demands while still serving regional markets.

Become a MazaoHub partner ecosystem hub

As a plantation or commercial farm, you can host a regional Farmer Excellence Center (FEC), train and manage outgrowers or contract farmers with our tools, provide services to surrounding smallholders (soil testing, inputs, aggregation), set quality and compliance standards across your network, and offer digital onboarding and training to partner growers.

Organic, climate-smart, or GAP-aligned?

We support your farm to convert to organic farming, meet climate-resilient standards, align with GlobalG.A.P., Rainforest Alliance, and more, digitally record compliance steps, and access certification and audit support — walking with you from data collection to training to certification to marketing.

More customers. More sales. More reach. More success. That's what MazaoHub InputConnect is built to deliver. Whether you run a small input shop in town, an agrovet store in the village, or a chain of agri-depots across regions, InputConnect is the digital and physical system designed to expand your reach, organize your business, and boost your income.

What is InputConnect?

InputConnect is MazaoHub's solution for agro-input dealers, agrovets, and last-mile suppliers — the smart, connected way to:

  • Sell to more farmers, near or far
  • Manage your shop from anywhere
  • Connect with agro-agents and agronomists as your sales force
  • Become a trusted Farmer Support Center with agronomy services
  • Join a nationwide, tech-powered agri-distribution network

Why input dealers choose InputConnect

Reach hundreds of farmers with one platform

  • Sell across your region using MazaoHub's farmer network
  • Appear on the platform as a certified input seller
  • Get alerts when farmers in your area need specific inputs
  • Offer delivery or pickup through nearby Farmer Excellent Centers (FECs)

Sell through agronomists & extension officers — your new agents

Appoint agronomists and government officers serving farmers as input agents: they earn commission, you sell more — an instant sales team on the ground promoting your products to trusted farmer networks.

Run your shop digitally — even when you're away

  • Track all inventory on your phone
  • Record every sale with a click
  • Monitor employees and shop performance remotely
  • Avoid stock-outs, expired products, or unsold inventory
  • See sales reports, trends, and profits anytime

Collaborate with other input sellers

  • Share bulk supplies when stock is low
  • Buy from wholesalers or manufacturers together
  • Trade stock regionally to avoid loss or spoilage
  • Build a united network of trusted input providers

Turn your shop into a Farmer Excellent Center (FEC)

Become a certified FEC: we equip you with a Soil Testing Kit so you test and sell more accurately, farmers come for recommendations (not just purchases), you charge for testing and advisory for new revenue, and you gain official recognition as a Farmer Support Hub — moving from input seller to agriculture partner.

Offer equipment & machinery leasing

List planters, sprayers, and irrigation kits on the leasing marketplace, get bookings from nearby farmers, track usage and servicing digitally, and earn from both product sales and tool rentals.

Get market insights & grow smarter

View demand trends from farmers' orders, know what crops are being planted and where, stock the right inputs, and offer packages by crop or season to boost volume sales.

Africa's agriculture is evolving — and so should agro-input distribution. Whether you manufacture or import seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, bio-stimulants, animal feed, irrigation tools, or mechanization solutions, you need more than logistics — you need visibility, trust, and distribution power, all the way from your warehouse to the farmer's field. MazaoHub's InputConnect Enterprise System gives input manufacturers and importers the structure and scale to reach new markets faster, manage dealers better, and grow with data — blending high-performing digital systems (Tech) with field-based distribution infrastructure (Touch).

A connected dealer network

Reach verified agro-dealers, distributors, and agrovets across multiple countries and:

  • Publish your products directly to their dashboards
  • Negotiate pricing, credit terms, and delivery digitally
  • Receive bulk orders from trusted buyers
  • Push promotions, trainings, and product-launch updates to their systems
  • Track engagement and conversion in real time

End-to-end supply-chain visibility

  • Live tracking of where your products are and who has them
  • Real-time inventory levels across your dealer network
  • Alerts for low stock or regional demand spikes
  • Full visibility from manufacturer → distributor → agrodealer → farmer

This helps you manage production, avoid overstocking or stockouts, and support local partners proactively.

Demand intelligence from the field

With data from thousands of farmers, extension agents, and agrodealers, we help you understand which crops are planted and where, forecast input demand per region/season/crop, analyze performance of specific SKUs or batches, identify where your brand is winning, and compare price points, competitor trends, and usage rates — turning demand data into production intelligence.

Farm trials, agronomist deployment & product support

Launching a new fertilizer blend, hybrid seed, or organic product? Access a network of certified agronomists across East and Southern Africa, farm-trial sites and demo plots through FECs and commercial farms, monitoring and reporting tools for trial performance and adoption, campaign support for awareness and training, and structured seasonal reviews and farmer interviews — proving your products' performance on real African farms.

Product registration & compliance

For manufacturers operating across multiple African countries: digital documentation workflows for input registration and approval, compliance tracking across regulatory bodies, custom labeling/translation/pack customization, and QR codes for traceability and authenticity — protecting your brand and simplifying cross-border scaling.

Real-world distribution footprint

Access a growing network of agro-dealers, cooperative shops, and last-mile retailers, certified FECs, independent village agrovets, and extension officers trained as brand agents. Run targeted promotions, distribution pilots, regional supply partnerships, and pay-as-you-go or bulk consignment systems — all managed digitally with reporting, tracking, and accountability.

Logistics & fulfillment

MazaoHub integrates with third-party logistics and supports regional dispatch and redistribution, stock movement between dealers, aggregated farmer-order delivery, and custom packaging and bundling (e.g., input kits for maize, rice, tomato, sunflower) — so your products move faster and more predictably.

Shape the future of African agriculture

Go beyond product sales: sponsor regional soil-testing hubs and FECs, launch traceable input campaigns linked to yields, support regenerative or organic pilots, provide financing support through bank/credit partners based on data, and offer crop-specific bundles with built-in services.

Traceability via CropSupply.com

Integrate your products into the continent's farm-to-market traceability platform: link inputs to farm-level records, demonstrate yield performance by season/location/farmer, support certified production (organic, GAP, regenerative), and help buyers trace food back to your inputs and your brand — so your product is credited for the success of Africa's harvest.

%s

%s

Request a demoSee pricing

Financing agriculture in Africa has always been seen as high-risk: farmers lack records, input use is uncertain, harvest performance is untracked, buyers disappear, and loans default. With MazaoHub, this changes. We offer financial institutions a fully integrated, transparent, data-backed agriculture ecosystem that works like a closed-loop value chain built on structure, tech, trust, and proof.

Why MazaoHub matters to banks, MFIs, credit unions & impact funds

  • Finance more farmers — safely
  • Lend to input dealers and agribusinesses with repayment assurance
  • Invest where you can see impact and data
  • Use credit guarantees and performance-based disbursement
  • Run systems that protect the money and prove the outcome

The Holy Trinity of agriculture lending

A digitally governed triangle, monitored in real time:

  1. The Farmer receives digital agronomy support, inputs, soil testing, and precision tools — with every activity tracked.
  2. The Input Dealer is supplied with credit to serve verified farmers; inputs are dispatched with digital receipts and monitored in real time.
  3. The Contracted Buyer (Off-taker) signs forward contracts and receives harvests traceable to input use, production plan, and expected output.

Money moves only when milestones are met, and harvests are sold under controlled terms.

How it works for financial institutions

Step 1 — Lending with structure

You disburse funds to the input dealer, not the farmer directly, while the farmer is mapped, verified, and guided by MazaoHub's agronomy team. Each farmer has a digital plan: soil results, crop choice, input prescription, and expected yield.

Step 2 — Monitoring in real time

MazaoHub monitors input delivery (date, volume, type), application in the field, farm activities, labor, disease alerts and compliance, weather/irrigation/performance data, and farmer progress versus forecast — visible in live dashboards or automated reports via email or API.

Step 3 — Harvest, sales, and repayment

At harvest, MazaoHub coordinates delivery to the contracted off-taker; crop is weighed, valued, and sold with digital receipts; proceeds repay the loan first, then the farmer — completing a fully traceable cycle. The result: less default, controlled cash flows, productive use of credit, and scalable loan recycling.

Tools & features for lenders

  • Loan portfolio dashboard: every farmer or dealer financed, linked to inputs, seasons, locations, and repayment timelines.
  • Digital credit files: geotagged land profile, soil test reports, input history, crop calendar, harvest forecast, and off-taker agreements.
  • Geo-mapping & activity logs: validated activities from planting to harvest for smarter risk assessment.
  • Disbursement controls: release funds in tranches — soil test done, inputs delivered, field monitored, buyer contract signed — then disburse.
  • Loan recycling & repeat lending: after repayment, the same farmers or dealers become eligible again, building trust-based repeat lending.

Guarantee & blended-finance ready

The structure has worked with credit guarantees, impact funds, development-bank partnerships, insurance integrations, and digital wallets/mobile-money payout. It works with or without collateral, because data replaces physical security.

Tech + Touch: assurance in the field

Tech collects every data point — soil, weather, yield, inputs, sales — while Touch puts agronomists on the ground to verify actions, support farmers, and collect evidence. Your investment is guided, supervised, and backed by real action.

Example: one cycle

  1. You approve $100,000 for inputs in Singida.
  2. MazaoHub maps 1,000 maize farmers and delivers soil kits.
  3. Inputs are dispatched to verified dealers and farmers.
  4. Agronomists monitor usage; software tracks performance.
  5. Off-takers pre-contract the harvest via CropSupply.com.
  6. Harvest is sold, the loan is repaid, and reports are generated.
  7. Farmers become pre-approved for next season — repeatable, scalable, and trusted.

%s

Request a demoSee pricing

In many developing nations, agriculture is the backbone of the economy — but with little backbone of data to support it. For governments across Africa, Latin America, and Asia, a critical gap stalling investment is the lack of reliable, timely, structured data, which discourages public and private investors from scaling inclusive, commercial farming partnerships with smallholder and emerging farmers. At MazaoHub we ask: what if your government had real-time data to manage agriculture like an investment portfolio?

Our vision with governments

Farmer-centric systems, policy-shaping data, national-level transformation. We start with the farmer, solving the core problem of missing agronomic insights, market access, and traceable value chains. Our Data-Driven Agronomy Software Platform is deployed directly in the field, in collaboration with governments, to collect, analyze, and act on real-time farm data — premium agronomy service excellence guided by data and dedicated agronomists, not enforcers.

See what's growing, everywhere, in real time

A live dashboard for your Ministry of Agriculture showing:

  • Which crops are grown per region, village, or ward
  • Projected harvest volumes and timing (e.g., carrots in Village X expected to yield 40 tons in July)
  • Daily aggregated yields sold by 200+ farmers in a district
  • Real-time crop flows through informal and formal markets
  • Supply gaps and surpluses per commodity and geography
  • Exported volumes and processors' offtake per value chain
  • A full map of government and private warehouses with current stock levels

End-to-end traceability for every value chain

From sugar, tea, and coffee to horticulture and cereals, MazaoHub integrates with commodity boards (customized dashboards per board), monitors production, aggregation, sales, and export in one system, tracks informal vendors, processors, cooperatives, exporters, and input usage, delivers traceability reports down to each farmer or cooperative, and powers instant market response with geo-tagged crop origin and supply-chain analytics — building transparency, traceability, and investor trust essential for export readiness and trade diplomacy.

Input subsidy impact monitoring

Track input distribution and effectiveness at scale: how many tons of fertilizer were distributed in a county, the yield improvement per subsidy, which input dealers were involved and how much was applied per crop, and the return per acre on mechanization or soil-amendment investment — quantifying the ROI of public investment with no guesswork.

A dedicated agronomist for every farmer group

Every farmer is connected to a dedicated agronomist who digitally registers farms, soil-tests each plot, tailors fertilizer and water recommendations, guides farmers step-by-step while collecting daily digital records, enables automatic data generation for governments with no manual reporting, and links with local research institutions and extension systems — creating a living national agronomy system, not static reports.

National crop supply and export visibility via CropSupply.com

Governments can profile and promote national crops to global buyers, with all exports fully traceable to farmer groups and locations for food-safety compliance. Exporters, buyers, and traders access digital supply catalogs linked to national production, country-to-country trade becomes seamless (e.g., Kenya buying Tanzanian maize or Rwanda sorghum), and the system maps registered exporters, bulk buyers, processors, and vendor networks.

Geo-mapping and informal market intelligence

  • Geo-mapped informal vendors and market traders by region
  • Volume movement per commodity at roadside, open-market, and vendor levels
  • Warehouse-to-market supply-chain mapping
  • Instant alerts on price distortions, post-harvest losses, or perishables in distress
  • Export movement analytics and food-system modeling tools

Partnerships with government boards & research institutions

We work with national crop boards and research institutions (tea, coffee, rice, maize, horticulture), Ministries of Agriculture and Planning at central and regional levels, local governments for regional FEC deployment, and government-owned input manufacturers and financial institutions — creating a smart agricultural nation where policies are backed by real-time data.

Key value propositions for governments

  • National Agronomy as a Service: digitize extension with dedicated field agronomists and AI-supported insights
  • Crop Production Dashboard: village-to-national view of crops grown, harvested, sold, and exported
  • Subsidy ROI Analytics: track input effectiveness and cost-benefit for each intervention
  • Cross-Border Trade Enabler: promote national commodities to global buyers via CropSupply.com
  • End-to-End Supply Chain Traceability: from farm to fork, all stakeholders linked and visible
  • Agro-Input Distribution Mapping: real-time visibility of inputs distributed by state, county, or dealer
  • Warehouse & Vendor Mapping: geo-mapped food stock and market intelligence
  • Research Linkage: direct connection to local R&D bodies for adaptive agronomy
  • Policy Support Engine: live data for planning, forecasting, and investment targeting

From soil to sovereignty

Our mission is to make data the new soil of national agriculture. Agricultural growth is a national security issue — governments cannot manage what they cannot see. With MazaoHub, your country can see clearly, live, and deeply. Built by Africans, for Africa — and for every nation ready to transform agriculture.

Who we serve

Explore other audiences

Smallholder Farmer (SHF)Cooperatives and AMCOSMid-Size FarmerPlantations and Commercial FarmsInputs DealerInput ManufacturerFinancial InstitutionsLarge Off-Takers
Home / Who we serve / %s

%s

%s

Request a demoSee pricing

In Africa's fragmented agriculture value chain, large off-takers face inconsistent supply, low traceability, high logistics costs, disconnected farmers and aggregators, and delayed payments with poor contract performance. MazaoHub solves this by organizing, digitizing, and monitoring the supply chain from the soil to your silo. We power CropSupply.com, a real-time sourcing platform giving large buyers direct access to verified farmers, structured aggregators, and digital contract-farming models — backed by agronomy data, performance tracking, and logistics coordination.

Categories of off-takers we serve

Food companies (processors & packagers)

Companies sourcing raw materials for consumer packaged goods, processed food, snacks, and staples — e.g., Bakhresa/Azam (maize, wheat, cassava, rice, sugarcane), Nestlé (sorghum, millet, maize, coffee, cocoa), Kellogg's/Mondelez via regional partners (maize, oats, sunflower), Twiga/Sanku/Africa Improved Foods (beans, maize, soy), and horticulture/avocado buyers. We enable direct contracts with cooperatives and commercial farms, pre-season agreements on volume/quality/timeline, soil and input tracking for GAP or regenerative compliance, digital aggregation and pre-harvest estimates, and live supply-chain dashboards.

Beverage companies (breweries & juice manufacturers)

For sorghum, barley, maize, mango, pineapple, passion fruit, sugarcane, citrus, and tomatoes — e.g., Serengeti Breweries/EABL, Coca-Cola/Sayona/Azam Juices, Tanzania Distilleries/Kenya Breweries, Inyange Industries, Tropikal Brands. We offer farmer contracting by variety, moisture %, and planting date, real-time farm-performance monitoring, aggregation scheduling with aligned harvest windows, logistics and cold-chain coordination, and quality and compliance tracking.

Exporters (fresh & dry produce)

For avocado, mango, pineapple, sesame, sunflower, groundnuts, dry beans, pigeon peas, green grams, cocoa, cashew, coffee, and organic/GAP-certified produce. Exporters get farmer data for traceability and compliance, geo-tagged supply with input records, batch coding/sorting/grading support, integration with logistics and phytosanitary services, verified contracts via CropSupply.com, and farm-gate-to-port sourcing traceability.

Millers & grain buyers

Bulk buyers for flour, oil, and animal feed across maize, sunflower, soybeans, and cassava. Benefits: contract farming by hectare with bundled input packages, AI-based harvest estimates, moisture and quality testing kits at FECs, timed aggregation and booking to manage storage pressure, and real-time price negotiation and scheduling.

Wholesalers, aggregators & retail chains

From Kariakoo/City Markets to Naivas, Carrefour, and institutional/relief buyers. Tools: order scheduling, farmer and aggregator network access, digital proof of delivery, payment processing (cashless, split payments), and contractual commitments with penalties and performance dashboards.

Core digital tools for off-takers

  • Order & inventory management: schedule procurement by crop, location, and harvest window; track confirmed, harvested, aggregated, and ready-to-ship volumes.
  • Live supply-chain visibility: see every cooperative, farm, and aggregator on your order; follow sowing → growing → harvesting → delivery.
  • Payments & reconciliation: bank transfer, mobile money, bulk payouts, and payment release tied to delivery validation — with automated receipts and farmer payment tracking.

Touch — physical services supporting buyers

  • Verified farmers & contract farming: mobilize, contract, and monitor thousands of farmers across Tanzania, Kenya, Rwanda, Uganda, and Zambia with soil-tested farms, input-controlled production, pre-season registration, in-season training and visits, and harvest/post-harvest quality checks.
  • FECs & aggregation infrastructure: organize aggregation at certified FECs, cooperative/AMCOS storage points, ward-level digital collection centers, and mobile hubs with sorting, grading, and quality checks.

CropSupply.com — a supply-chain operating system

Large buyers can view crop availability by district, ward, and crop type; pre-contract with farmers before planting; align volume, price, and logistics early; see agronomic performance of contracted crops; receive automated reports with maps, dates, photos, and yield forecasts; and track delivery, weighbridge data, and payment compliance. It's not a marketplace — it's a supply-chain operating system.

Why off-takers choose MazaoHub

  • Verified and trained farmers
  • Guaranteed traceability from planting to post-harvest
  • Digital contracting and legal enforceability
  • Aggregation, logistics, and payment tracking
  • Compliance with local and export requirements
  • Continuous visibility on growing progress
  • Multi-crop, multi-region capacity
  • Seamless collaboration with agrodealers, agronomists, and FECs
Who we serve

Home / Reports

Impact Reports

Measured impact on Tanzanian farmers, in their own words

Unveiling the Impact of MazaoHub in Tanzania — a report by 60 Decibels

We're thrilled to share the results of a collaboration with 60 Decibels, a leading impact-measurement firm, diving deep into MazaoHub's impact on Tanzanian farmers. We extend sincere gratitude to Catalyst Fund for partnering with us on this initiative.

The report unveils some remarkable findings:

  • Empowering farmers with unprecedented access: 93% of farmers using MazaoHub had never before encountered services like its hyperlocal soil analytics, and 83% report difficulty finding a suitable alternative — highlighting the critical role MazaoHub plays.
  • Improved lives and livelihoods: farmers report a significant positive impact on overall well-being and livelihood security, alongside an 83% reduction in chemical fertilizer use — a shift towards more sustainable practices.
  • Tangible improvements and high satisfaction: 82% of farmers credit MazaoHub with an improved quality of life through increased production, income, and knowledge, with a Net Promoter Score (NPS) of 88 — placing MazaoHub in the top 20% of agricultural ventures benchmarked by 60 Decibels.

Meeting the challenge, one farm at a time: as climate change intensifies, innovative solutions that empower farmers with data-driven, sustainable decision-making become increasingly crucial. MazaoHub offers Tanzanian farmers affordable, real-time soil analysis and personalized recommendations — a formula for boosting yields and incomes.

To learn more, read "Why We Invested in MazaoHub" by Catalyst Fund, and the full Impact Report by 60 Decibels.

MazaoHub Impact Report 2024–2025

Inside these pages is the heartbeat of a growing movement — one led by over 54,000 smallholder farmers, women reclaiming their right to the land, young agronomists building businesses in forgotten villages, and a technology that listens before it speaks.

MazaoHub is not just improving agriculture — it's restoring dignity, agency, and hope to the people who feed our continent. Discover how AI, agronomy, soil tests, and markets are coming together to rewrite what's possible in African agriculture. Read the stories. Feel the shift. Be part of the transformation.

Request the full report
Home / Global Board & Advisors

Global Board Advisors

Meet our distinguished panel of global advisors bringing expertise and strategic guidance.

01

Kasper Hounsgaard

Board Director · Global

Kasper is a founder, technology leader, and systems thinker who has built his career around using data, operational insight, and practical innovation to solve complex real-world challenges. As Co-CEO and Founder of Copenhagen Optimization, he brings valuable experience in scaling technology products, improving decision-making systems, and building organizations around measurable impact.

StrategyLeadershipInnovation
02

Ester Bortot

Board Director · Global

Ester Bortot is a Director at elea, where she focuses on impact investing in Africa and contributes to pipeline development, due diligence, and value creation for mission-driven ventures. Based in Johannesburg as part of elea's Africa Hub, she represents elea on MazaoHub's board. She previously worked with purpose-driven startups across Africa and the UK in regenerative agriculture, nutrient upcycling, and techbio, after beginning her career in finance with Renaissance Capital, HSBC, and Rothschild & Co. She holds an MSc in African Development from the London School of Economics and a BA in Economics & Finance from Durham University.

StrategyLeadershipInnovationGrowth
03

Toffene Kama

Board Director · Global

Toffene Kama is part of Mercy Corps Ventures, where the focus is on supporting bold early-stage solutions that help vulnerable communities build resilience. Toffene brings a thoughtful perspective shaped by climate adaptation, food systems, and mission-driven innovation in emerging markets.

StrategyLeadershipInnovation
04

Maelis Carraro

Board Director · Global

Maelis Carraro is the Managing Partner of Catalyst Fund and a seasoned impact investor with deep experience supporting early-stage technology ventures across emerging markets. She brings strong expertise in climate resilience, inclusive innovation, and founder support, shaped by years of work with startups, investors, development finance institutions, and mission-driven funding platforms.

StrategyLeadershipInnovationGrowth
05

Geoffrey Kirenga

Board Director · Global

Geoffrey Kirenga is a seasoned agricultural leader with deep experience in Tanzania's crop systems, public-sector agriculture, and value-chain development. As CEO of SAGCOT Centre Ltd., he brings long-standing leadership in building partnerships across government, agribusiness, and development actors to advance agricultural transformation and investment in Tanzania.

StrategyLeadershipInnovation
Home / Data Intelligence / Soil & Nutrient Data
Engine 01 · Command Center

Soil & Nutrient Data

A living soil map of East Africa — pH, organic matter, NPK and the full nutrient profile, sampled field by field.

500,000+hectares mapped
205,472soil samples indexed
15nutrients per test
9regions live

Tanzania soil coverage

Over 500,000 hectares sampled and mapped across the country, with satellite and remote-sensing layers over every cluster. Expanding into Kenya, Rwanda, Uganda and Zambia.

Active soil-sampling cluster
High-density coverage zone

What the soil engine sees

  • Macronutrients: nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P) and potassium (K) per plot, village and region.
  • Soil health: pH, organic matter, electrical conductivity (EC) and texture.
  • Micronutrients: the full 15-nutrient profile from the MazaoHub Soil Scanner.
  • Change over time: how fertility shifts season over season as farmers adopt recommendations.

Where MazaoHub has soil data

Coverage is densest across Tanzania's core farming corridors and is expanding into Kenya, Rwanda, Uganda and Zambia. Every point on the map above is a cluster of geo-tagged soil samples collected through Farmer Excellent Centers and field agronomists, layered with satellite and remote-sensing data for the surrounding land.

Home / Data Intelligence / Nitrogen & Fertilizer
Engine 02 · Command Center

Nitrogen & Fertilizer

Market data intelligence for fertilizer: how much is needed, how much is used, who supplies it, and exactly where.

Liveprice index
Urea · DAP · CANtypes tracked
Village → Countrygranularity
Pre-seasondemand forecast

Demand intelligence

  • Projected fertilizer demand by crop, season, region and country — before the planting window opens.
  • Application gaps: where farmers under- or over-apply against agronomic recommendations.

Consumption &amp; usage

  • Actual usage captured from input orders, FEC sales and field-activity logs.
  • Type split across urea, DAP, CAN, NPK blends and organic amendments.

Suppliers &amp; distribution

  • The biggest suppliers, importers and agro-dealers active in each region.
  • Distribution flow tracked from manufacturer to distributor to agro-dealer to farmer.

Geography

  • Drill from country to region to district to village to see exactly where demand and usage concentrate.

Benchmarked against global fertilizer market signals (in the spirit of price and trade indices such as Argus) and grounded in MazaoHub's own field-level data.

About MazaoHub.

The company behind the hospital for farms — built by people who have lived the very problem they are solving, and who refuse to let any farmer farm blind.

Our story

Why MazaoHub exists.

Being a founder, I share the same experience with my partner co-founder. My parents were small-scale farmers. I was raised and lived with my grandmother and worked as a small-scale farmer. I have witnessed the suffering of being a small-scale farmer.

Set aside being belittled as helpless poor people. The pain I went through is unforgettable. These painful challenges are still the same challenges facing rural farmers today.

One of the critical and painful challenges: lack of close agronomic support. Many farmers do not have close support. Imagine one government agricultural officer responsible for supporting over 3,000 rural farmers manually — most are left struggling with outdated practices on their own.

“In our village we had an extension officer called bibi shamba in Swahili. From when I was a child to adulthood — for more than 17 years — I never saw her in our field, nor received any support from her. We relied on ourselves for everything. Our lives were lonely, and sometimes we felt like we had no value in society.”

This is the life of many isolated rural farmers in Africa.

The absence of data-driven agronomy services creates a vicious cycle of low productivity. Many farmers resort to trial-and-error farming, lacking the data to make informed decisions. This not only hinders their yields but also contributes significantly to environmental problems — i.e. 17% of carbon emissions. Without proper knowledge and simple technology tools to assess soil health, crop development, inputs and post-harvest practices, farmers often misuse resources, leading to poor-quality produce that fails to meet market standards. This results in a devastating 50% yield reduction.

These challenges trap farmers in a cycle of poverty, despite having access to over 60% of Africa's arable land. MazaoHub was born out of this very need. We provide a comprehensive solution through our Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform. Our approach goes beyond just technology — we use the innovative Tech & Touch Model for technology distribution.

3,000+farmers per government officer
17 yrswithout field support
17%of global carbon emissions
50%avoidable yield loss
60%of Africa's arable land
How we work

A seamless blend of cutting-edge technology and personalized support.

This is what the Tech & Touch Model offers — technology that reaches the last mile, and human hands that make it trusted.

The Tech

Data-driven digital agronomy

We give farmers the tools and information they need to make informed decisions through tailored insights and analytics from our farming SaaS — an offline mobile app, a simple AI-powered chatbot, AI-driven SMS alerts, and advanced FARM ERP tools.

The Tech

Hyperlocal soil testing & analytics

Our hyper-local approach lets us gain a deep understanding of each farmer's land — paving the way for optimized crop yields, farm by farm.

The Touch

Farmer Excellence Centers

Physical centers established within rural communities serve as trusted hubs — akin to agricultural clinics, or “Kliniki za Kilimo” as the farmers themselves call them. Here, farmers receive in-person guidance from our skilled agronomists, all equipped with MazaoHub's technologies.

Tech & Touch — technology in one hand, a trusted agronomist in the other.
Built by engineers

Three engines, one platform.

Under the Tech & Touch model sits a decade of engineering — three systems that compound into one living intelligence network.

Agronomy Engine · 2022 → 2028

AI farm management

From a staff-only tool to an automated engine: Farm Plan, AI crop knowledge, CNN disease detection on 500K+ images, predictive yield, and an LLM agronomy assistant in Swahili, English & French.
Soil Intelligence · 2023 → 2030

The Lab-in-a-Bag sensor

A hand-held electrochemical soil probe — ISE, ISFET and voltammetric detection — growing from N·P·K pins to a 20-parameter, carbon-aware kit feeding a continental, privacy-preserving federated AI.
InputsConnect · 2025 → 2028

Inputs intelligence

700+ agrovets, POS and QuickBooks-style finance, wholesale and manufacturer connectivity, counterfeit alerts — evolving into demand forecasting and Africa-calibrated price intelligence.
Explore the full technology roadmap →
Why we exist

Mission & Vision.

Mission

MazaoHub builds farm-care infrastructure — bringing science, data, human support and agronomy close to smallholder farms, strengthening crops worldwide and restoring livelihoods.

Vision

Every smallholder farm thriving, landscapes regenerating globally.

Join the mission

No farmer should farm blind.

Partner with us, invest, or bring MazaoHub to your community.

Request a demo Back to home
What we offer

Everything a farm needs, in one system.

From a 5-minute soil test to harvest sold — the full Tech & Touch stack that turns guesswork into ground truth.

What we offer

Three layers of intelligence, one living system.

We replace guesswork with ground truth — affordable soil science, hyperlocal advisory, and dashboards turning every farm into trusted data for banks, buyers, ministries, input manufacturers, distributors and research institutions.

01 / SOIL

Affordable soil testing

Geo-tagged sensors capture nutrients, pH, moisture, temperature and electro-conductivity — automated, real-time analysis ready in 5 minutes of testing.

02 / ADVISORY

Hyperlocal, expert advisory

Our Farmer Excellence Centers are trust-and-value hubs — farm software, extension services, input delivery and soil testing, all in one place, all close to home.

03 / DATA

Data & insights for all

Dashboards that help farmers run operations, food companies optimize supply chains, and banks issue loans against verified, real-time farm performance.

We are turning traditional agrovet shops into Farm Clinics — a hospital for farms, powered by AI, data and science.

MazaoHub is changing how the world treats soil, water, plants, microorganisms, farmers — and the environment itself.

Our Engine

We are building the world’s largest intelligence engine for agriculture.

AI agronomy agents, a live call centre and a field team — answering 15,000+ farmer queries a day in Swahili, English and French.

The AI engine beneath every harvest

We are building the world's largest intelligence engine for agriculture.

Drones, soil sensors, satellite climate feeds and a network of agronomists feed one model. It diagnoses, recommends and forecasts — then learns from every transaction on the ground. The more the network farms, the smarter the engine gets. This is the intelligence flywheel.

Home / Products / Field Operations Management Module
Tech

Field Operations Management Module

The tool to support field agents and farmers to manage daily farm activities

Request a demoSee pricing

MazaoHub Field Operations

  • Land preparation: information on soil types, crop rotation, and planting dates, with progress tracking and early flagging of challenges.
  • Crop planting: planting methods, fertilizer requirements, and pest control, with progress tracking.
  • Crop monitoring: crop growth, water requirements, and pest infestation, with progress tracking.
  • Crop harvesting: harvesting methods, post-harvest handling, and storage, with progress tracking.
  • Market intelligence: crop prices, demand, and supply.
  • Financial management: budgeting, record-keeping, and access to credit.
  • Risk management: crop insurance, weather forecasting, and disaster preparedness.
  • Training and extension: agricultural practices, technologies, and markets.
  • Communication: a platform for farmers to talk to each other, to off-takers, and to agricultural experts.

It can also be used to

  • Track the progress of agricultural projects such as irrigation schemes and crop diversification programs, so they are implemented effectively and meet their goals.
  • Identify and address challenges faced by farmers — pests and diseases, drought, and market volatility — to improve productivity and profitability.
  • Improve decision-making by giving farmers access to information and insights about their crops, finances, and businesses.
  • Promote sustainable agriculture with guidance on sustainable farming practices that reduce environmental impact and improve land productivity.

How field agents use MazaoHub

  • Land preparation: draw on a database of soil types, crop-rotation plans, and planting dates to build a plan tailored to each farmer.
  • Crop planting: apply the right planting methods, fertilizer requirements, and pest control for each crop.
  • Crop monitoring: use crop-growth charts, water requirements, and pest symptoms to catch problems early.
  • Crop harvesting: apply correct harvesting methods, post-harvest handling, and storage.
  • Market intelligence: use price, demand, and supply data to help farmers get the best price.
  • Financial management: help farmers budget, keep records, and access credit when needed.
  • Risk management: explain risks and help farmers mitigate them through insurance, forecasting, and preparedness.
  • Training and extension: develop training programs and deliver extension services.
  • Communication: share information, answer questions, and resolve problems on one platform.
The product suite

Home / Products / Soil Analysis and Recommendations Tool
Tech

Soil Analysis and Recommendations Tool

Mazao Hub Soil Scanner integrated with MazaoHub AI Agronomy

Request a demoSee pricing

MazaoHub Soil Scanner

  • Soil testing: the process of analyzing a soil sample to determine its nutrient content, pH level, and other properties. This tells a farmer the best crops to grow in a particular soil and helps build a fertilizer application plan.
  • MazaoHub Soil Scanner: an IoT device that uses near-infrared spectroscopy to analyze soil samples. It measures the levels of 15 nutrients in a sample — including nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, calcium, magnesium, sulfur, iron, manganese, zinc, copper, boron, molybdenum, chloride, sodium, and cobalt.

The soil testing process

  1. The farmer takes a soil sample from their field.
  2. The soil sample is placed in the MazaoHub Soil Scanner.
  3. The scanner analyzes the sample and generates a report showing the levels of the 15 nutrients.
  4. The farmer uses the report to choose the best crops and to build a fertilizer application plan.

Building soil maps: MazaoHub is building soil maps one farm at a time by collecting samples from farms across the continent. These maps identify areas with different soil types and nutrient levels, helping farmers select the best crops for their area and develop tailored fertilizer plans.

15 nutrients covered in soil analysis

  • Nitrogen (N), Phosphorus (P), Potassium (K), Calcium (Ca), Magnesium (Mg), Sulfur (S), Iron (Fe), Manganese (Mn), Zinc (Zn), Copper (Cu), Boron (B), Molybdenum (Mo), Chloride (Cl), Sodium (Na), Cobalt (Co).

Tailored recommendations: based on the soil test results, MazaoHub advises the best crops to grow, the amount of fertilizer to apply, and the best time to apply it.

What makes MazaoHub stand out

  • Affordability: very affordable, accessible even to small-scale farmers.
  • Accuracy: reliable information about the nutrient content of the soil.
  • Ease of use: simple enough for farmers with limited technical skills.
  • Tailored recommendations: guidance built from each farmer's own soil test.
  • Soil maps: continuously built one farm at a time.

How the Scanner and AI Agronomy work together

  • The Soil Scanner generates a report of the 15 nutrient levels in the sample.
  • The report is uploaded to the MazaoHub AI Agronomy platform.
  • The platform uses it to generate recommendations for the farmer.
  • The recommendations are sent to the farmer's mobile phone.

Together, the Soil Scanner and AI Agronomy automatically guide a farmer through every stage of farming — from land preparation to harvest — recommending the best crops, fertilizer amounts and timing, pest and disease management, irrigation schedules, and harvesting methods. Each scanner carries a unique serial number, letting MazaoHub track usage and measure impact: samples analyzed, fertilizer applied, and the resulting crop yields.

The product suite

Home / Products / AI Powered Agronomy
Tech

AI Powered Agronomy

MazaoHub AI Agronomy Module

Request a demoSee pricing

AI Agronomy is a cloud-based platform that uses artificial intelligence to give farmers recommendations on crop selection, fertilizer application, and other agricultural practices. MazaoHub AI Agronomy is trained on a massive dataset of soil readings from MazaoHub soil sensors plus crop data, and it generates customized recommendations for each farmer.

Steps in the AI Agronomy service

  • Land preparation: recommends the best crops for a particular soil based on soil reports, how much fertilizer to apply, how to apply it, and when — plus pest and disease management, irrigation schedules, and harvesting methods.
  • Sowing: the best sowing method for a crop, the depth to sow, and the spacing between plants.
  • Fertilizer application: the best fertilizer, the amount, and the best time to apply it.
  • Water management: the best irrigation schedule for a crop (connected to sensors), how much water, and the best way to apply it.
  • Pest and disease management: the best control methods, the timing of treatment, and how to apply it.
  • Harvesting: the best harvesting method, the time to harvest, and how to store the crop.
  • Post-harvest handling: drying, grading, and packaging.
  • Storage: the best storage conditions — temperature, humidity, and light exposure.

How extension officers feed the AI

  • Extension officers in each village collect information from farmers — crop type, fertilizer applied, water used, and yields.
  • They enter this information into the MazaoHub AI Agronomy platform.
  • The platform uses it to improve its recommendations.

The platform is constantly trained on new data from farmers, extension officers, and other sources. The more data it sees, the more accurate it becomes — until it can advise a farmer as reliably as a real agronomist delivering extension services.

Data collection process

  1. Training extension officers: officers in each village are trained on the MazaoHub platform and equipped with smartphones or tablets running the MazaoHub app.
  2. On-field data collection: officers visit farms regularly, recording crop health, soil conditions, weather observations from the Meteo Agency, and any issues seen in the field.
  3. Image and sensor data: they capture crop images, soil samples via MazaoHub Sensors, and environmental readings, then upload them to the platform.
  4. Data synchronization: the collected data syncs to the central MazaoHub database, where AI algorithms analyze it.
  5. AI recommendations: based on the data and historical trends, the AI generates recommendations for each farmer.
  6. Feedback loop: officers relay recommendations to farmers and record their feedback, which steadily improves accuracy.

The 12 steps of Good Agricultural Practices (GAP)

  1. Land preparation: soil analysis determines plowing and leveling needs.
  2. Sowing: optimal planting time and spacing from weather and soil conditions.
  3. Crop selection: crop varieties suited to the region.
  4. Fertilization: precise recommendations based on soil nutrient levels.
  5. Irrigation: scheduling guided by weather forecasts and soil moisture.
  6. Weed management: herbicide or manual weeding guidance.
  7. Pest and disease control: identification and suitable treatments.
  8. Crop monitoring: continuous tracking of growth and health.
  9. Pruning and thinning: crop-maintenance guidance.
  10. Harvesting: optimal timing based on crop maturity.
  11. Post-harvest handling: sorting and packaging.
  12. Storage and marketing: storage conditions and market access.

Home / Products / Sensors & IoT
Tech

Sensors & IoT

MazaoHub Farm IoT and Sensors

Request a demoSee pricing

MazaoHub Farm IoT and Sensors are a suite of devices that collect data on many aspects of farming — soil moisture, air temperature, crop growth and more. The data feeds directly into MazaoHub AI Agronomy to improve irrigation, fertilization, and pest control.

Devices for smart, sustainable agriculture

  • Soil moisture sensors: measure how much water is in the soil, to optimize irrigation and prevent waterlogging.
  • Air temperature sensors: measure air temperature, to optimize ventilation and protect crops from frost.
  • Crop growth sensors: measure crop growth, to optimize fertilization and catch pests and diseases early.
  • Pest and disease sensors: detect pests and diseases so pesticides and fungicides can be applied early, before they spread.
  • Weather stations: collect rainfall, humidity, and wind-speed data to optimize irrigation and protect crops from extreme weather.

The MazaoHub device family

  1. Soil Sensors — MazaoHub Soil Scanner. Already developed and in the market.
  2. Weather Stations — MazaoHub WeatherMaster (pilot stage). An advanced weather station for accurate local forecasts, helping farmers anticipate rainfall and temperature changes and adjust planting and harvesting schedules to reduce weather-related risk.
  3. Crop Health Sensors — MazaoHub CropGuard (pilot stage). Continuously monitors crop health — leaf temperature, humidity, and leaf wetness — to detect early signs of disease and pest infestation for timely intervention.
  4. Automated Irrigation — MazaoHub IrrigationFlow (pilot stage). Integrates with soil data to deliver the precise amount of water crops need, cutting water waste and energy use.
  5. Pest Control Drones — MazaoHub AeroGuard (pilot stage). A drone system with cameras and sensors that surveys large areas, identifies pest hotspots, and deploys targeted control — reducing harmful pesticide use.
The product suite
